task_description: Build a complete CCT Rectangle Trading Bot from scratch with multi-timeframe strategy (4H direction, 15M weakness, 1M entry), backtesting engine, and results output. Completely standalone, no references to existing repo code.

verification.summary: pip install succeeded, python3 main.py produced full backtest results: 9 trades, 66.7% win rate, +15.86% return, profit factor 5.93, max drawdown 1.00%. All strategy rules implemented and validated.
